payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Large bed (appears king-size) with a white-and-gray horizontal striped duvet and matching pillows, dark wooden footboard visible in the foreground; the bed fills most of the lower half of the crop and is slightly cropped at the left/right edges, camera approximately 1.8 meters from the footboard.
